ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the weather station in meters */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., automatic, manual, mobile) */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station collecting the data */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the data collection */,
  "cloud_condition" TEXT /* Cloud condition (e.g., Partly Cloudy) */,
  "rain_or_snow" TEXT /* Precipitation type (e.g., rain, snow) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "apparent_temperature" REAL /* Apparent temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "wind_bearing" REAL /* Wind bearing in degrees */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in km */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure in millibars */,
  "condensation" TEXT /* Condensation type (e.g., Frost, Dry) */,
  "solar_irradiance_intensity" REAL /* Solar irradiance intensity */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing data_sources */,
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing data_formats */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Exact time of data collection */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature in Celsius */,
  "precipitation_amount" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in mm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station for which the forecast is generated */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "forecast_text" TEXT /* Text of the forecast */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy percentage of the forecast */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Name of the model used for forecasting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather warning */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station for which the warning is issued */,
  "warning_date" TEXT /* Date of the warning */,
  "warning_type" TEXT /* Type of warning (e.g., storm, heatwave) */,
  "warning_text" TEXT /* Text of the warning */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the warning (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the warning expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_warnings_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., forecaster, researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization to which the user belongs */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data or forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station for which the data or forecast is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data or forecast was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., ground-based, satellite) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "format_version" TEXT /* Version of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)
